formulas.name: 大 O 表示法
formulas.formula: f = O(g(n)) if ∃c,n0 s.t. f(n) ≤ c*g(n) ∀n ≥ n0

formulas.name: 图灵机
formulas.formula: M = (Q, Σ, Γ, δ, q0, q_accept, q_reject)

formulas.name: IRT 单参数模型（Rasch）
formulas.description: Rasch 模型：正确作答概率

formulas.name: 因子分析模型
formulas.description: X:观测变量，Λ:因子载荷，F:因子分数

formulas.name: PCA（SVD 分解）
formulas.formula: X = U Σ V^T, 主成分 = V 的列

formulas.name: KMO 检验
formulas.description: r=偏相关，p=相关，>0.6 适合因子分析

formulas.name: SEM 测量方程
formulas.formula: y = Λ_y η + ε, x = Λ_x ξ + δ

formulas.name: SEM 结构方程
formulas.formula: η = B η + Γ ξ + ζ

formulas.name: ACT-R 激活方程
formulas.description: B:基础级，S:源级，P:部分匹配，O:输出干扰

formulas.name: ACT-R 基础级学习
formulas.description: t_j:第 j 次学习的年龄，d:衰减参数（默认 0.5）

formulas.name: ACT-R 扩散激活
formulas.description: W:连接权重，A:源激活，S:扩散强度

formulas.name: Soar Q-Learning 更新
formulas.formula: Q = α[r + γ max_a' Q(s',a') - Q(s,a)]

formulas.name: 极小极大定理
formulas.formula: max_min u_i = min_max u_i（零和博弈）

formulas.name: 整合信息论 Φ（Tononi）
formulas.description: Φ:整合信息量，越大越有意识

formulas.name: 因果涌现
formulas.formula: CE = MI(cause | cut) - MI(cause | no cut)

formulas.name: 预测编码自由能
formulas.formula: F = -ln p(s, μ) = -ln p(s|μ) - ln p(μ)

formulas.name: 预测误差
formulas.formula: ε = s - g(μ), 其中 g:生成模型

formulas.name: 情绪混合模型
formulas.formula: E_mixed = Σ_i w_i · E_i, Σ w_i = 1

formulas.name: 社会影响模型（French-Harary）
formulas.formula: x_i = x_i(t) + λ Σ_j w_{ij} (x_j(t) - x_i(t))

formulas.name: FitzHugh-Nagumo 模型
formulas.formula: dv/dt = v - v³/3 - w + I, dw/dt = (v + a - bw)/τ

formulas.name: 脉冲时间依赖可塑性（STDP）
formulas.formula: Δw = A_+ e^{-Δt/τ_+} if Δt>0, Δw = -A_- e^{Δt/τ_-} if Δt<0

formulas.name: 脑网络模块度
formulas.formula: Q = (1/2m) Σ_{ij} (A_{ij} - k_i k_j/2m) δ(c_i, c_j)

formulas.name: 耶克斯-多德森最优唤醒
优先主义
formulas.formula: V = Σ_i w(u(i)) · u(i), w decreasing

formulas.name: 大 O 记号
formulas.formula: f(n) = O(g(n)) ⇔ ∃ M>0, n₀ s.t. |f(n)| ≤ M|g(n)| for n>n₀

formulas.name: P 类问题
formulas.formula: P = {L | L is decidable in polynomial time}

formulas.name: 前景理论
formulas.formula: v(x) = x^α if x≥0, -λ*(-x)^β if x<0

formulas.name: 强化学习
formulas.formula: Q(s,a) = Q(s,a) + α*(r + γ*max_a' Q(s',a') - Q(s,a))

formulas.name: q'=燃气实际放出的热量/m_{燃气}
formulas.name_en: q'= actual heat released by the gas/m_{gas}
formulas.formula: q'= actual heat released by the gas/m_{gas}

formulas.name: 生活垃圾完全燃烧放出的热量=m×q
formulas.name_en: heat released by complete combustion of household waste=m×q
formulas.formula: heat released by complete combustion of household waste=m×q

formulas.name: 天然气释放的热量=W
formulas.name_en: The heat released from natural gas =W
formulas.formula: The heat released from natural gas =W

formulas.name: 全局工作空间理论
formulas.formula: consciousness = global broadcast of local processors

formulas.name: STDP窗口
formulas.formula: dW = A_plus*exp(-dt/tau_plus) if dt>0, -A_minus*exp(dt/tau_minus) if dt<0

formulas.name: BCM规则
formulas.formula: dW = eta*phi(post, theta)*pre where theta = f(post^2)

formulas.name: 否定后件
formulas.formula: P -> Q, not Q |= not P

formulas.name: 假言三段论
formulas.formula: P -> Q, Q -> R |= P -> R

formulas.name: 析取三段论
formulas.formula: P or Q, not P |= Q

formulas.name: 归谬法
formulas.formula: P -> (Q and not Q) |= not P

formulas.name: 德摩根定律(与)
formulas.formula: not(P and Q) = not P or not Q

formulas.name: 德摩根定律(或)
formulas.formula: not(P or Q) = not P and not Q

formulas.name: 分配律(与)
formulas.formula: P and (Q or R) = (P and Q) or (P and R)

formulas.name: 分配律(或)
formulas.formula: P or (Q and R) = (P or Q) and (P or R)

formulas.name: 逆否命题
formulas.formula: P -> Q = not Q -> not P

formulas.name: 实质蕴涵
formulas.formula: P -> Q = not P or Q

formulas.name: 无知之幕
formulas.formula: justice = principles chosen behind veil of ignorance

formulas.name: Determinant of 3x3 Matrix
formulas.formula: det\left([[a, b, c], [d, e, f], [g, h, j]]\right) = a * \det([[e, f], [h, j]]) - b * \det([[d, f], [g, j]]) + c * \det([[d, e], [g, h]])

formulas.name: 积分判别法
formulas.formula: sum(a_n)收敛 <=> integral(f(x), x, 1, inf)收敛

formulas.name: 微积分基本定理(第一基本定理)
formulas.formula: d/dx integral(f(t), t, a, x) = f(x)

formulas.name: 微积分基本定理(第二基本定理)
formulas.formula: integral(f(x), x, a, b) = F(b) - F(a)

formulas.name: 莫雷拉定理
formulas.formula: integral(f(z), z, C) = 0 for all C => f全纯

formulas.name: 施瓦茨-克里斯托费尔映射
formulas.formula: f(z) = A*integral(product((t-x_k)^(alpha_k-1)), t, z0, z) + B
